title: Falcon - Unpair Headset from Charge Stand
scenario: Unpairing headset from Charge Stand via Clear Trusted Device List does not show Charge Stand info in Software Update after re-pairing
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
Navigate to Device Settings > Reset Device.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'.
Verify the headset disconnects from the app.
Remove the headset from the app's device list.
Go to the phone's Bluetooth settings and forget/unpair the headset.
Re-pair the headset with the phone and app via standard Bluetooth pairing.
Verify the headset is properly paired and connected.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update.
Observe the information displayed on the Software Update screen.
expected: 1. After tapping 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List', the headset disconnects from the app. 2. After re-pairing, the headset is properly paired and connected to both the phone and app. 3. On the Software Update screen, no information about the Charge Stand is shown.
